name: ADB Keeper
description: Keeps ADB server alive and reconnects known network-attached emulators (LDPlayer, MuMu, Nox)

settings.label: Endpoints
settings.description: Comma-separated host:port list to keep connected (e.g. 127.0.0.1:16384,127.0.0.1:5555)

settings.label: Reconnect interval (s)
settings.description: How often to ensure each endpoint is connected

settings.label: ADB binary path
settings.description: Override ADB binary path (default: 'adb' on PATH)
